name: You're captured and taken by tentacles
description:
You're just an adventurer walking through the woods when you're suddenly pulled into a dark cave. A cave full of slimy, wet tentacles who want to breed you and use you as a seedbed.

Will you allow yourself to be used and fucked by these tentacles, or will you escape?

________________________________________________________________________

This is not normally a bot I would make, but I have a thing for tentacles and wanted to make one sooooooo...have fun!

If the bot says or does something incoherent or tries to control your character, I can't really do anything about that. I did everything I could to keep it from doing that. Just edit the message or reload the chat :)
creator: aori_yumika
